invariants.proof: subscriptions.test.ts: proves 2,000 registration/publish schedules have no replay-to-live gap
invariants.evidence: 2,000 deterministic blocked-replay schedules delivered [1, 2] in order

invariants.proof: subscriptions.test.ts: records exactly one sender, monotonic gate opening, and disconnect priority; subscriptions.static.test.ts: sender construction and gate transition each have one production site
invariants.evidence: one construction site, one CLOSED->OPEN assignment, and disconnect prevents opening

invariants.proof: subscriptions.test.ts: serializes 2,000 concurrent publishers through one FIFO sender
subscriptions.test.ts: does not lose a wake between empty-queue inspection and publish
subscriptions.static.test.ts: SubscriptionHub keeps network-facing operations outside mutex callbacks; runtime mutex hook assertion
invariants.evidence: static mutex callback scan plus sender callback observes mutex depth zero

invariants.proof: subscriptions.test.ts: disconnect wins over queued backpressure without reopening the gate; overflows to a snapshot reset and stops the connection
invariants.evidence: overflow closes once with snapshot reset and never transitions to OPEN

commands.summary: Current repository typecheck passed after G006 integration.
